name: wanxiangshu-next
description: Wanxiangshu.Next Structured Flow runtime compiled via Fable

scripts.build-and-test: npm run build && cd ../tests-next && dotnet fable Wanxiangshu.Next.Tests.fsproj --outDir ../build/tests-next --precompiledLib ../build/next && node --test runner.test.mjs && node runner.js
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && cd ../tests-next && dotnet fable Wanxiangshu.Next.Tests.fsproj --outDir ../build/tests-next --precompiledLib ../build/next && node runner.js unit
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && cd ../tests-next && dotnet fable Wanxiangshu.Next.Tests.fsproj --outDir ../build/tests-next --precompiledLib ../build/next && node runner.js integration
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && cd ../tests-next && dotnet fable Wanxiangshu.Next.Tests.fsproj --outDir ../build/tests-next --precompiledLib ../build/next && node runner.js e2e
